steps.title: Identify the subject structure
steps.content: The subject is “The trefoil knot and the figure-eight knot”—two nouns joined by “and.” The phrase “each with a crossing number below five” is a parenthetical modifier that doesn't change the subject's structure.

steps.title: Apply the agreement rule
steps.content:
Compound subjects joined by “and” require plural verbs. B) are is the only plural verb form and correctly agrees with the compound subject.

A) was, D) is, and C) has been are all singular forms that violate subject-verb agreement.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
